name: Potential Mosquito Activity
notes: This rule detects Mosquito activity which is a Win32 backdoor.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2) match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation match
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2) match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation match
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2) match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation match
TD_list: APPLY Potential Mosquito Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2) match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation match
RED_list: Event description: Detects Mosquito activity which is a Win32 backdoor.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
